//: jobwright Claude Code hooks. deploy_safety (PreToolUse/Bash) asks before destructive job/SQL commands. session_start emits a one-line skill+catalog pointer inside a jobwright repo. regenerate_jobs_index (PostToolUse/Write|Edit) keeps JOBS.md/OBJECTS.md fresh. All are stdlib-only, fail-open, and zero-cost outside a jobwright repo (they no-op unless jobwright.config.yaml is present).
